subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen, in the sweet Persian tongue, guideth them that are possessed of utterance unto the Most Sublime Horizon. Blessed be they who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی بلسان پارسی احلی اهل انشا را بافق اعلی هدایت میفرماید طوبی از برای
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @suffering and imprisonment
